title: Faculty Awards | The Webb Schools | Private Boarding & Day School
content:
2025 Faculty & Staff Award Recipients
The Thompson and Vivian Webb Award
was established and
endowed by Dr. Edmund Piper, Webb Schools of California ’43
to honor Thompson and Vivian Webb, and it is given to a
teacher who has made an outstanding impact on The Webb
Schools in service for three years or less.
The 2025 recipient is
Mairin Balisi
.
The
James T. Demetriades Prize for Unbounded Teaching
was established in 2005 by Jim Demetriades ’80 in celebration
of his 25th reunion. Mr. Demetriades established this prize to
recognize a teacher specifically for an innovative and creative
course, program or approach that fosters a hearty appetite for
the joys of unbounded thinking and learning among students
and others.
The 2025 recipient is
Stephen Hebert
.
The
Laurence McMillin Excellence in Teaching Award
was
established by David Loo ’79 to honor his beloved Webb
teacher and to provide faculty members in
their first three to five years of teaching with resources to
cultivate their skills and to strengthen their affiliation with The
Webb Schools.
The 2025 recipient is
Cory Warren
.
The affiliates established and endowed the
Jean E. Miller Excellence in Teaching Award
in honor of Vivian Webb School’s second headmistress to recognize a teacher who has made an outstanding impact on The Webb Schools and has served the schools for more than three years. The recipient is determined by a preferential ballot among teachers, parents, and students, and the award includes a stipend for the recipient’s use in professional growth activities.
The 2025 recipient is
Elizabeth Cantwell
.
The
John and Madeline
Frampton
Staff Celebration
Award
was established in 2023 to recognize a staff member who has demonstrated a strong work ethic, excellent moral character, and a desire to meet and support the needs of others.
The 2025 recipient is
Annalise Reynosa
.
